evals.prompt: Push changes, create a PR, and auto-merge when CI passes
evals.expected_output: Changes pushed to feature branch, PR created, CI monitored, auto-merge executed when green
assertions: branch is created automatically from commit message
PR includes commit summary and context
auto-merge uses squash method by default

evals.prompt: Monitor an existing PR and report on pre-existing vs new CI failures
evals.expected_output: CI status reported with clear distinction between pre-existing and newly introduced failures
assertions: new failures are flagged as blocking
merge is allowed when only pre-existing issues remain

evals.prompt: Auto-rebase a PR that is behind main and re-run CI checks
evals.expected_output: PR rebased onto main, force-pushed with lease, CI re-triggered and monitored
assertions: merge conflicts are handled or reported
